name: Pelvic Curl
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, knees bent, feet placed firmly on Mat, arms by sides
cues: Draw abdominals in prior to movement
Maximize lumbar flexion as pelvis and spine roll up and down
Articulate through each vertebra as spine rolls up and down
Return to neutral spine after each repetition

name: Spine Twist Supine
setup: Lying supine, lower back imprinted, arms in T position, palms facing up, legs in tabletop position (hips and knees at 90 degrees)
exhale: Lift legs to center, return to start position
cues: Keep shoulders relaxed and scapulae on Mat
Move legs and pelvis as one unit
Initiate rotation with abdominals

name: Chest Lift
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, legs parallel, knees bent, feet hip width apart, fingers interlaced behind head
cues: Maintain pelvic stabilization
Keep head aligned with spine when lifting into spinal flexion
Allow head to rest in hands
Engage hip adductors throughout

name: Chest Lift with Rotation
cues: Maintain pelvic stabilization
Maximize rotation while avoiding lateral flexion
Move head, shoulders and chest together as one unit
Maintain trunk flexion at consistent height

name: Single Leg Lift
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, knees bent, feet placed firmly on Mat, arms by sides
inhale: Lower leg, touch Mat with toes
cues: Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization
Keep shoulders relaxed
Maintain consistent angle of knee joint (90 degrees)

name: Leg Changes
setup: Starting in Single Leg Lift position
cues: Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization
Keep shoulders relaxed
Maintain consistent angle of knee joint (90 degrees)

name: Hundred Prep
setup: Lying supine, legs in tabletop position, arms overhead, palms facing up
exhale: Lift arms, head and chest, bringing arms to sides
inhale: Lift arms to 90 degrees, lower chest and head, return to start position
cues: Move head and chest as one unit
Maintain pelvic and lumbar stabilization
Minimize neck tension
Maintain tabletop position with legs

name: Roll Up
setup: Lying supine in neutral spine position, arms overhead, palms facing each other, legs straight and together, feet plantarflexed
inhale: Lift arms up and forward, followed by head and chest; pause
exhale: Roll up to eyes over knees; roll down, return to start position
cues: Pause briefly in Chest Lift position
Maintain C curve when rolling up and rolling down
Pause when shoulders are in front of hip joints and eyes are over knee joints
Keep head aligned with spine

name: Leg Circles
setup: Lying supine, arms down by sides or in T position, one leg straight up to ceiling, foot dorsiflexed, other leg on Mat, foot plantarflexed
inhale: Bring leg across center line, circle down and around
cues: Keep shoulders stable
Maintain fluid movement
Keep circles within range of pelvic lumbar control

name: Roll-Like-a-Ball
setup: Sitting in balanced position, body in ball shape, legs bent, hands on shins close to ankles, feet off Mat
exhale: Roll forward, return to start position
cues: Maintain fluid movement
Keep ball shape consistent
Keep head aligned with spine
Keep pulling legs toward chest and heels toward sit bones
